purpose: To introduce the HubSpot customer platform and its various hubs, encouraging users to get a demo or start using its free tools.
summary: This page serves as an introduction to HubSpot's comprehensive customer platform, outlining its various components like Marketing, Sales, and Service Hubs. It aims to onboard new users by offering options to get a demo or start for free, while also detailing the features of specific products like Marketing Hub to illustrate value.
